title: Element Response Descriptor (ERD)
description: Non-normative, machine-consumable behavioral component datasheet for a RIS / reflectarray unit cell. Declares what the unit cell does at the Phase API boundary without exposing internal geometry, substrate stack-up, or bias-circuit details. Companion artifact to: R. D. Javor, 'The Phase API', ZeroPilot Corporation, 2026.

realized_phase_range.description: Achievable phase extent [min, max] in degrees.

phase_quantization_resolution.description: State granularity in degrees. Determines quantization residual.

amplitude_variation_dB.description: Peak-to-peak amplitude variation across phase states, in dB. Aperture efficiency loss predictor.

amplitude_phase_coupling_dB_per_rad.description: Amplitude-phase coupling in dB/rad. Command realization error / runtime correction budget.

nearest_neighbor_coupling_dB.description: Nearest-neighbor coupling |S| magnitude in dB. Coupling metadata; declared, not hidden in synthesis.

operating_frequency_grid_GHz.description: Frequency grid in GHz. Core field; enables wideband squint prediction. A scalar lookup table cannot express per-frequency beam pointing.

per_state_insertion_loss_dB.description: Per-state insertion loss in dB. Per-state gain contribution to link budget.

phase_error_rms_deg.description: State-realization phase error, 1-sigma Gaussian, in degrees. Feeds EVM budget.

amplitude_error_rms_dB.description: Amplitude error, 1-sigma, in dB. Feeds aperture efficiency.

calibration_uncertainty_budget_deg.description: Residual implementation error, 1-sigma, in degrees. Performance confidence margin.

temperature_drift_deg_per_C.description: Phase drift in degrees per degree C. Environmental stability declaration.

state_transition_timing_us.description: State-transition timing in microseconds. Controller scheduling constraint.

svr_core_angular_limits.description: Core region: scalar/vector control sufficient with ordinary runtime complexity.

svr_marginal_angular_limits.description: Marginal region: apply higher-order corrections, prepare predictive handoff.

wideband_squint_deg_per_GHz.description: Squint profile across the frequency grid, in degrees per GHz.
